privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to start from a blank canvas in SolveSpace and create a new model, making the data entirely synthetic. The expected output path (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/mounting_plate.slvs) is explicitly enforced in export_result.sh and cleared in setup_task.sh. The geometric parameters (50mm width, 30mm height, 12mm hole diameter) exactly match the requirements stated in the task description instructions, although verifier.py only checks for structural CAD operations (extrusion, boolean difference, sketch groups) rather than enforcing exact dimensions.
